segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Hi, come and take a seat.
segments.zh: 嗨，进来坐吧。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: My name's Carl Rogers and I'm one of the doctors here at the Total Health Clinic.
segments.zh: 我叫卡尔·罗杰斯，是这家全康诊所的医生之一。所以，这是你第一次来我们诊所吧？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: So I understand this is your first visit to the clinic?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Yes, it is.
segments.zh: 是的。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: OK, well I hope you'll be very happy with the service you receive here.
segments.zh: 好的，希望您对我们的服务满意。如果您不介意的话，我想先问几个问题，以便为您提供最好的服务。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: So if it's alright with you I'll take a few details to help me give you the best possible service.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Sure.
segments.zh: 当然可以。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: So can I check first of all that we have the correct personal details for you?
segments.zh: 首先，我核对一下您的个人信息是否正确。您的全名是朱莉·安妮·加西亚吗？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: So your full name is Julie Anne Garcia?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: That's correct.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Perfect.
segments.zh: 太好了。能给我一个联系电话吗？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: And can I have a contact phone number?

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: OK, and then can I just check that we have the correct date of birth?
segments.zh: 好的，那我确认一下您的出生日期是否正确？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: October tenth, 1992.

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Oh, I actually have 1991, I'll just correct that now.
segments.zh: 哦，我这里显示的是1991年，我现在改一下。好了，没问题了。现在我还需要一些个人信息……您有工作吗，全职还是兼职？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Right, so that's all good.

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Now I just need just a few more personal details ... do you have an occupation, either full-time or part-time?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Yes, I work full-time in Esterhazy's – you know, the restaurant chain.
segments.zh: 有的，我在Esterhazy's全职工作——就是那个连锁餐厅。几年前我从服务员做起，现在已经是经理了。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: I started off as a waitress there a few years ago and I'm a manager now.

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Oh I know them, yeah, they're down on 114th Street, aren't they?
segments.zh: 哦，我知道那家店，在114街对吧？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Yeah, I've been there a few times.
segments.zh: 是啊，我去过几次。我就是喜欢他们的沙拉。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: I just love their salads.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: That's good to hear.
segments.zh: 听你这么说真好。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Right, so one more thing I need to know before we talk about why you're here, Julie, and that's the name of your insurance company.
segments.zh: 好的，朱莉，在谈你来的原因之前，我还需要知道一件事，就是你保险公司的名字。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: It's Cawley Life Insurance, that's C-A-W-L-E-Y.
segments.zh: 是考利人寿保险，拼写是C-A-W-L-E-Y。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Excellent, thank you so much.
segments.zh: 太好了，非常感谢。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Now Julie, let's look at how we can help you.
segments.zh: 现在，朱莉，我们来看看怎么帮你。跟我说说你今天为什么来这儿吧。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: So tell me a little about what brought you here today.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Well, I've been getting a pain in my knee, the left one.
segments.zh: 嗯，我的膝盖一直疼，是左膝盖。一开始不太严重，但后来加重了，所以我觉得应该来看看。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Not very serious at first, but it's gotten worse, so I thought I ought to see someone about it.

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: That's certainly the right decision.
segments.zh: 这当然是个正确的决定。那你意识到这个疼痛有多久了？只有几天，还是更长时间？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: So how long have you been aware of this pain?

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Is it just a few days, or is it longer than that?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Longer.
segments.zh: 更久了。最近两天更严重了，但第一次注意到是三周前。不过它是慢慢加重的，所以我一开始没太在意。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: It's been worse for the last couple of days, but it's three weeks since I first noticed it.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: It came on quite gradually though, so I kind of ignored it at first.

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: And have you taken any medication yourself, or treated it in anyway?
segments.zh: 那你自己吃过什么药，或者做过什么处理吗？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Yeah, I've been taking medication to deal with the pain, Tylenol, and that works OK for a few hours.
segments.zh: 嗯，我一直在吃止痛药，泰诺，能管几个小时。但我不想一直吃。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: But I don't like to keep taking it.

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。那热敷呢？你有没有试过热敷？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: And what about heat treatment?

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Have you tried applying heat at all?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: No, but I have been using ice on it for the last few days.
segments.zh: 没有，但我这几天一直在冰敷。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: And does that seem to help the pain at all?
segments.zh: 那冰敷对缓解疼痛有帮助吗？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: A little, yes.
segments.zh: 有一点帮助。

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Good.
segments.zh: 好的。看起来你平时身体挺健康的？

segments.speaker: CARL
segments.en: Now you look as if you're quite fit normally?

pairs.note: 题干问联系方式电话，原文用'核对个人信息'引出，电话属于个人信息之一。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求填写联系电话，原文在核对个人信息时提到，后续会询问电话号码，因此定位到此处。

pairs.note: 题干问出生日期，原文说'October tenth'，是日期的另一种表达方式。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问出生日期，原文中'October tenth'直接对应日期，因此定位到该句。

pairs.note: 原文直接说'I'm a manager now'，manager就是职业。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问职业，原文中'I'm a manager now'直接给出了答案。

pairs.note: 题干说保险公司，原文具体说是人寿保险公司，是同义替换。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问保险公司名称，原文直接说Cawley Life Insurance，所以定位到Cawley。

pairs.note: problem 被替换为 pain，表示问题具体是疼痛。
题干问问题类型，原文具体说膝盖疼痛，即问题类型是膝盖。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问问题类型，原文中患者描述膝盖疼痛，因此问题类型是膝盖。

pairs.note: began 对应 first noticed，表示开始注意到症状

pairs.p: three weeks since I first noticed it
pairs.note: 题干问开始时间，原文用 since 结构回答，时间点为 three weeks

paraphrase.explain: 定位到原文中 'three weeks since I first noticed it'，其中 first noticed 对应 began，three weeks 即为答案。
